# V4.0.0 Valstrax 🚀

1. iPhone 和 iPad 首个版本正在 App Store 审核中，同一个 App Store 购买将可覆盖 macOS 和 iOS，敬请期待
2. iPad 将提供三栏布局，文件夹、笔记列表和阅读详情可以同时展开
3. iOS 首版将支持 iCloud 笔记库、外部文件夹、置顶笔记、新建和编辑
4. iOS 首版也重点打磨首次同步、大库加载、搜索和卡片预览，希望打开更稳
5. macOS 新增目录菜单和 cmd+5 快捷键，长文导航更直接
6. 修复 Sparkle 签名和版本号漂移，优化 cmd+2 折叠、侧边栏选中态、边缘分割线、单编辑器标题区、PDF Mermaid 导出和附件文件名
7. 改进保存、删除、版本历史、Finder 打开、符号链接和 iCloud placeholder 场景

---

1. The first iPhone and iPad version is under App Store review, with one Universal Purchase planned across macOS and iOS
2. The iPad version will bring a real three-column layout for folders, notes, and reading
3. The first iOS version will support iCloud libraries, external folders, pinned notes, new notes, and editing
4. The first iOS version is being polished for first sync, large library loading, search, and note card previews
5. Add a TOC menu item and cmd+5 shortcut on macOS for faster long-note navigation
6. Fix Sparkle signing and version drift, plus cmd+2 collapsing, sidebar selection, edge dividers, the editor-only title bar, PDF Mermaid export, and attachment filenames
7. Strengthen save, delete, version history, Finder-open, symlink, and iCloud placeholder handling
